titleStmt.title: SII 26.623: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 623.

summary.p: On a slab built into the platform of the flag-staff in the Vēṇugōpālasvāmi temple.

p.hi: Śaka 1576, Jaya, Māgha śu. 11 = 1655 A.D., February 6 (Tuesday)

summary.p: It records the construction of a court-yard for the temple of Madana Gōpāla at Guḍipāḍu and setting up of a lamp-pillar (tiruvaḷike-kaṁbha) by China Yallimarāju of Charikoṇḍa, who is the son of Timmarāju and grandson of Chinakṛishṇamarāju belonging to Ātrēya-gōtra for the merit of his father Timmarāju and mother Māchamma. A Telugu verse at the end eulogises in praise of the donor's father.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbbulu 5176 ja
ya saṁvvatsara māgha śudha 11 lu Amaracaṁḍḍēśvara Adi
bāṁdhavulaina Ātrēyasagōtra pavitrulaina cinakriṣṇamarāju tru
timmarāju putrulaina carikoṁḍḍaṁbhaṭṭu cinayallamarāju vāru tama taṁ
ḍri [gōpa ?] timmarājukunnu tamatalli mācammaṁgārikinni puṇyamugānu cerlō
guḍipāṭi madanagōpāluni sannidhini kṛṣṇārpaṇamugānu cavutarā gaṭṭiṁcci tiruva
ḷike kaṁbhamu yettiṁccenū . ka . kavitanuta rūpaguṇa sallalita yaśōdhāra dhīralāvaṁ
ṇyamulan . yilani pratibhaṭajanamulu galarē carikoṁḍḍa timmaghanu cinayallā . śrīṭhāmā .
Digital edition of SII 26.623 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
